title: Primo Water Declares Special Dividend in Connection With Merger Deal
author: Zacks
description: Primo Water announced a special dividend of 82 cents per share, an 811% increase from its quarterly dividend, in connection with its merger with BlueTriton. The company continues to see organic growth and strategic investments, positioning it well for the future.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Primo Water's strong performance, including organic customer growth, strategic investments, and the potential benefits of the merger with BlueTriton. The company's decision to declare a special dividend also suggests confidence in its future prospects.
The article mentions that IDACORP has recently raised its quarterly dividend rate, indicating a shareholder-friendly approach and stable financial performance.
Similar to IDACORP, the article notes that American States Water has also increased its quarterly dividend rate, suggesting a focus on rewarding shareholders.
The article highlights that New Jersey Resources has raised its quarterly dividend rate, indicating a strong financial position and commitment to shareholder returns.

title: Here's Why You Should Add FirstEnergy Stock to Your Portfolio Now
author: Zacks
description: FirstEnergy's continuous capital investments to maintain and increase resiliency are likely to strengthen its infrastructure, which will help enhance its performance. The company's growth opportunities, dividend policy, and financial metrics make it a solid investment option in the Utility sector.

title: Reasons to Add IDACORP (IDA) to Your Portfolio Right Now
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: IDACORP (IDA) makes a strong case for investment, given its earnings growth prospects, impressive cost management and highly liquid operations.

title: PSEG (PEG) Rides on Investments Despite Weak Financial Position
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: PSEG (PEG) is expected to benefit from renewable expansion and its systematic investment plan despite the effects of elevated costs to remediate all MGP sites.

title: AES Rides on Renewable Expansion, Declining Wholesale Prices Ail
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: AES is projected to gain from expanding renewable generation and decreasing carbon emissions from its portfolio amid the impacts of declining wholesale prices.
